info.name: Clinical Synthesis Hub - Comprehensive Order Management GraphQL
info.description: Complete Postman collection for testing Order Management Service (CPOE Core) GraphQL operations through API Gateway > Auth > Apollo Federation Gateway > Order Management Microservice. Includes all 43 comprehensive operations covering authentication, order creation, clinical decision support, order sets, lifecycle management, federation, analytics, and health checks.

item.name: 🔐 Authentication

request.description: Authenticate with Supabase and get JWT token for API access with automatic token extraction
Verify the authentication token and get user context including roles and permissions

item.description: Authentication operations to get and verify JWT tokens with RBAC support

item.name: 📋 Order Creation & Capture
Create Clinical Order (FHIR ServiceRequest) - Full 60+ Fields

request.description: Create a comprehensive FHIR-compliant clinical order with full 60+ field implementation including all required and optional FHIR ServiceRequest fields

item.name: Create Medication Order (FHIR MedicationRequest) - Complete Dosing & Dispensing

request.description: Create a comprehensive medication order with complete dosing instructions, dispensing details, substitution rules, and clinical context

item.description: Core clinical order management operations including order lifecycle management, clinical decision support integration, order sets/protocols, and FHIR-compliant data models

item.name: 🩺 Clinical Decision Support
Create Order with CDS - Drug Interaction Checking

request.description: Create order with comprehensive clinical decision support including drug interaction checking, allergy alerts, and clinical recommendations
Check for potential drug interactions with comprehensive safety validation and management recommendations

item.description: Clinical decision support integration with drug interaction checking, allergy alerts, clinical guidelines, and safety recommendations

item.name: 📋 Order Sets & Protocols

request.description: Create a comprehensive standardized order set for hypertension management with customizable options

item.description: Standardized order sets and clinical protocols for common conditions and procedures with customization options

item.name: 🔄 Order Lifecycle Management

request.description: Sign and activate a draft order with digital signature and audit trail
Put an order on hold with detailed reason and audit trail

item.description: Complete order lifecycle management including draft, active, hold, cancel, and complete states with comprehensive audit trails

item.name: 🔗 Federation & Cross-Service

request.description: Test federation between Patient and Order services with comprehensive cross-service data retrieval
Test federation between Encounter and Order services

item.description: Apollo Federation testing with cross-service queries and entity resolution

item.name: 📊 Order History & Analytics
Get Order History - Complete Audit Trail

request.description: Retrieve complete audit trail and history for a specific order including all modifications, status changes, and signatures

item.description: Order history, analytics, and audit trail operations for compliance and reporting

item.name: 🔍 Schema & Introspection

request.description: Complete GraphQL schema introspection to explore all available types, queries, mutations, and their relationships
Get all available GraphQL types with focus on Order Management types and their field structures
Get all available queries and mutations with their arguments and return types

item.description: GraphQL schema introspection and type exploration for development and debugging
